title: Promotions & Discounts
description: Create special offers and coupon codes to attract more guests.

edit_modal.title: Edit Promotion
edit_modal.description: Set up your discount. It will apply to the selected rate plans within the validity period.
edit_modal.no_rate_plans_warning: You must define at least one Rate Plan before creating a promotion.

add_modal.title: Create New Promotion
add_modal.description: Set up your discount. It will apply to the selected rate plans within the validity period.
add_modal.no_rate_plans_warning: You must define at least one Rate Plan before creating a promotion.

list.no_promotions: No promotions found. Click "New Promotion" to get started.

validation.coupon_required: A coupon code is required for this promotion type.

delete_dialog.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete_dialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the promotion "{{name}}".

toasts.permission_denied: Permission denied or property not identified.
toasts.promo_applied_error: This promo code is not valid for the items in your booking.
toasts.promo_code_empty: Please enter a promotion code to apply.
toasts.promo_code_invalid: The promotion code you entered is not valid.
